---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**Before you file:** this project has explicit non-goals — no auto-apply,
scraping, mass submission, hosted SaaS, or payment infra. Requests in those
directions will be declined. See the README.

**The problem**

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

**Proposed solution**

What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**

Other approaches you thought about, if any.
